race.comment: ARRANGEMENT (7) landed midfield and was too good last start, scoring by 0.6L over this distance. He draws well again today at his third career start and he looks a nice horse on the rise. Can continue to work his way through the grades in what looks a suitable event. PONY UP (5) sat handy and was just too good over this course and distance 9 days ago when winning by 0.6L. Martinan's claim comes in handy and her early speed is a big bonus from the awkward draw. Can go on with the job. DARK LOOKS (1) is better than she showed first-up and will appreciate this easier race today. Drawn nicely and won't be far away. STARATING (4) was impressive off a long break and has to be included with that run under her belt.
